title: Kaatrin Mozhi
desc: A housewife content with her life still sometimes dreams of independence. Later, her wishes come true when an unexpected opportunity to become a radio jockey arises.

title: Idharkuthane Aasaipattai Balakumara
desc: An idle youngster causes chaos in the life of a disciplined banker, whose struggles with his demanding boss are further complicated by the youth's carefree attitude.

title: Meiyazhagan
desc: Arul visits his hometown for a wedding. He meets a relative whose kindness helps him reconnect with forgotten family ties and precious memories.

title: Trigger
desc: An undercover police officer locks horns with a gangster after his adopted niece is kidnapped. Later he learns how the kidnappings of children are connected to his father, a former policeman.

title: Nela Ticket
desc: An orphan boy, Nela Ticket, is raised by Ananda Bhupathi at his orphanage in Bangalore. Years later, when Ananda is killed by a corrupt politician, Nela sets out to take revenge.

title: Airaa
desc: After fleeing to her grandmother's village, Yamuna is haunted by a spirit. Meanwhile, Amudhan, a fellow villager, investigates a series of murders occurring in the region.

title: Sadugudu Vandi
desc: Shiva, struggling to find a decent job, finally takes up the job of a cab driver. However, things take an eerie and spooky turn when mysterious deaths start happening in the cab.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: YSR Yatra
desc: A renowned Indian politician embarks on a 900-mile walking tour and interacts with his followers as part of his election campaign.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Kaathu Vaakula Rendu Kaadhal
desc: Love knocks on the door of Rambo, an unlucky man. However, a dilemma arises when he develops feelings for two women at the same time.

title: Pon Manickavel
desc: Pon Manickavel, IPS officer, is given the task to solve the case of a judge's murder. While his team attempts to crack the crime, the lives of high-profile persons are threatened.

title: Aruvam
desc: A woman with anosmia experiences paranormal events and soon finds herself involved in a series of mysterious murders linked to food adulteration.

title: Uravukku Mariyathai
desc: Santosh decides to keep his grandmother Sita Mahalakshmi happy at any cost because she helped him in a game of hide and seek during his childhood.

title: Por Thozhil
desc: With limited evidence in a race against time, two police officers must combine their skills and experience to arrest a psychopath targeting women.

title: Nadungaadhey Illathil Pei
desc: A man poses as a tantric to earn money for his love interest's orphanage. However, things take a turn when a ghost begins to follow him after he pretends to perform an exorcism.
